HomePage.title: AI Quiz Generator Canada - Interactive Quiz Maker for Educators & Businesses
HomePage.description: Transform text, PDFs, or videos into interactive quizzes, surveys, or assessments with our AI-powered quiz builder in Canada. Ideal for educators, HR teams, and professionals looking to engage audiences or gamify experiences.

HomeHero.title: Quiz Maker Canada: AI Tools for Quizzes, Surveys & Assessments
HomeHero.description: Build personalized quizzes, surveys, and tests for classrooms, corporate training, or events. Ideal for education and business in Canada.

JoinCommunityAlert.title: Join our community!
JoinCommunityAlert.description: Hearify is here to help you learn faster and more efficiently. Join our Facebook community to get fast feedback on your questions and talk with people who have the same interests.

ai_generate_custom_quiz: AI Quiz Generator from PDFs, Videos & Text
ai_automatically_create_questions: Automatically create questions for assignments, tests, and exams from your content with our ultimate AI question generator. Ideal for educators, students, professionals, and lifelong learners.
try_out_ai_quiz: Try our AI quiz creator now—completely free of charge!
boost_your_knowledge: Boost Your Knowledge: Create Personalized Quizzes with AI!
materials_upload: What kinds of materials can I upload?
question_types: You can create multiple choice and single choice questions, fill in, matching and open questions.
quiz_quality: What is the quality of the quizzes?
any_material: It could be any book, presentation, document or YouTube video link
choose_difficulty: Choose difficulty, number of questions and your preferences
click_button: Click the button, wait a few minutes and your quiz is ready! You can edit it if needed
copy_code: Copy code to start your engaging quiz session
automatic_grading: The system automatically grades and creates a rating among all participants
free_beta_testing: Yes, during beta te sting you can generate up to 30 quizzes per month.
file_requirements: It could be any book, presentation, lecture or document. The file must be in PDF format and weigh less than 10 MB. You can also insert YouTube video link.
create_quiz_in_minute: Create your <1>custom</1> quiz in just <3>1 minute!</3>
terms_of_use_and_privacy_policy: Be sure to take a look at our <1>Terms of Use</1> and <4>Privacy Policy</4>
blog_description: Dive into the world where artificial intelligence meets personal growth. Our blog is dedicated to providing you with engaging AI quizzes that not only test your knowledge but also enhance your learning experience. Discover insightful tips on how to maximize your study sessions, utilize AI tools for smarter learning, and continuously improve yourself.
library_description: Learn, Play, and Challenge Yourself! It's a place where you can find quizzes on all kinds of topics. Whether you want to learn something new or just have a good time, we've got quizzes for you.
